chain.thought: Explanation: Looking at the "total wins" column, the highest number of wins is 11, which occurred in 1992. Therefore, the group saw their most successes in 1992.

judge_thought: Explanation: The most successful year can be identified by the highest number of total wins and notable postseason/standing achievements. In 1992, the team recorded 11 total wins—the highest of any season—and also finished 1st in the conference with a postseason result of reaching the quarterfinals. No other year exceeds 11 wins (the next highest is 8).
